scores.materiality_reasoning: Social standing/disgrace is primarily symbolic, though it affects marriageability and future networks.
scores.generality_reasoning: Applies specifically to the timing of capitulation in pederastic courtship.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Bounded to the specific life stage of being a 'favorite' (youth).
scores.immutability_reasoning: Minors/youth is a biologically fixed age category at the time of the rule.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Plato describes the Athenian 'convention' (nomos) of his own time.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a social standard ('our convention regards...') with normative explanation.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a minor does not inherently define one as being 'disgraced' by quick yielding.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Eligibility for archonship grants direct access to state power and legal authority.
scores.generality_reasoning: Public career access is a foundational axis of political life.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Eligibility lasts for the duration of adult male citizenship.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Adult male status is a fixed biological and legal category.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the actual political structure of Classical Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Uses a myth to explain an observed social fact about who holds office.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Maleness does not tautologically imply holding political office.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Enforcing contracts has direct material consequences for property and wealth.
scores.generality_reasoning: Contractual validity is a foundational principle of the legal system.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Legal personhood and the right to contract are lifelong for citizens.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Citizenship is a stable legal birth-status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Cites the 'city's sovereign, the law' currently in force.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: States the legal status of voluntary agreements as a plain fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a citizen does not define the validity of a contract.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Marriage and procreation involve property transfer (dowry) and bodily autonomy.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers the broad social requirement of household (oikos) formation.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Marriage is a long-term structural state in a man's life.
scores.immutability_reasoning: The group is defined by biological sex (men).
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the 'stress of custom' (nomos) in contemporary Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a social compulsion existing despite individual inclination.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a man does not inherently mean one is married.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Status as 'knowledgeable' is an abstract epistemic and social label.
scores.generality_reasoning: Tied to a specific philosophical distinction between opinion and knowledge.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The status holds as long as the person lacks a 'rational account'.
scores.immutability_reasoning: One can leave this group through further education/philosophy.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the intellectual distinctions made in Plato's contemporary circles.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Plato is arguing for a specific philosophical classification.
scores.tautology_reasoning: The unlearned (by definition) lack the status of being knowledgeable.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Access to divine communication provides social power and a livelihood.
scores.generality_reasoning: Recurring access to the broad category of sacrifice and ritual.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Priesthood and 'skill in these affairs' are generally long-term roles.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Expertise is acquired through training/initiation.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the contemporary practice of Athenian religion and divination.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Describes the role of the 'spiritual man' in society for the Gods.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Religious practice (the activity) is the basis for the status, not its definition.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The status of being a 'spiritual man' is an abstract honorific/reputation.
scores.generality_reasoning: General exclusion from a broad class of religious/prestige status.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Artisan status (banausos) was typically a lifelong occupational/social class.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Occupation is durable but technically changeable with effort.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the contemporary social hierarchy of Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Directly categorizes artisans as 'mechanical' versus the 'spiritual' expert.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being an artisan does not inherently mean one is non-spiritual.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The capacity to procreate is a biological and material function of the body.
scores.generality_reasoning: Procreation is a fundamental biological and societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Bounded to the period of life before puberty/maturity.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age is an immutable biological fact at a given time.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects a universal human biological fact accepted by the author.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports it as a fundamental fact of human nature ('All men are...').
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a minor is not the same as the biological definition of procreation.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Rearing of shrines involves real property (land, buildings) and cult honors.
scores.generality_reasoning: A major legal/social honor that spans many city-states.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Shrines and 'immortal renown' are intended to be permanent, even post-mortem.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Poet/Legislator are roles achieved through specific great works.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Cites historical figures (Solon, Lycurgus) from the past.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports existing cults/honors for these famous men as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Legislating does not tautologically result in being granted a shrine.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The 'vision of absolute beauty' is a purely intellectual/spiritual attainment.
scores.generality_reasoning: Hyper-specific to the Platonic philosophical path/revelation.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Treated as a permanent, final transformative attainment of the soul.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Defined by being 'uninstructed'—a behavioral/educational deficiency.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the initiatory process proposed in the author's present.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Part of an exhortative speech about the soul's proper ascent.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being uninstructed does not definitionally exclude one from Beauty itself.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Mentorship/learning provides skills and social standing with tangible outcomes.
scores.generality_reasoning: Access to education is a broad category for elite advancement.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Bounded to the youthful period of courtship and tutelage.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Birth-assigned sex and age are the defining criteria.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the actual social/educational institution of pederasty in Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Describes a social 'method' and 'induction' as it historically functioned.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a boy does not define the receipt of educational mentorship.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Presence at a symposium provides food, drink, and networking access.
scores.generality_reasoning: Narrowly scoped to a single social institution (the symposium).
scores.persistence_reasoning: The resource is access to a specific, one-off social gathering.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Intimacy is a durable social relation but subject to change.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects contemporary Athenian dinner-party protocols.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: A direct instruction from a master to his domestic staff as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being an 'intimate' is not the same as being 'at the party'.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Personal protection/oversight by an attendant is a physical/legal security resource.
scores.generality_reasoning: Recurring protection for wealthy youth in public/semi-public spaces.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Lasts during the 'youthful bloom' period (pre-adulthood).
scores.immutability_reasoning: Defined by biological age and free status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the contemporary Athenian custom of the paidagogos.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a standard personal practice based on custom.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a minor does not define having an attendant (poor minors didn't).

scores.materiality_reasoning: Autonomy is the most fundamental material control over one's own body.
scores.generality_reasoning: Loss of autonomy is a foundational structural axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Slave status was generally lifelong unless manumitted.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Enslavement is a structural legal status difficult to change.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the role of slaves in contemporary Athenian households.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Direct observation of commands given to and obeyed by slaves.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Having NO autonomy is the legal definition of being a slave.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Exclusion from high-status discourse prevents networking and education.
scores.generality_reasoning: Participation in legal/intellectual life is a major societal right.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Exclusion is a permanent feature of the person's status as a slave.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Slave status is a fixed legal category.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the social mores and physical layout of contemporary gatherings.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the necessity of exclusion using strong normative language ('must').
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a slave does not inherently define physical proximity to discourse.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Right to dispose of property (land, money) is a tangible entitlement.
scores.generality_reasoning: Property rights are a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Wealth and property disposal rights are structural and long-term.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Wealth is a durable but potentially changeable economic status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the actual property rights of the Athenian leisure class.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: A statement of personal intent based on existing legal power.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Wealthy people (by definition) are those who possess property to dispose.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Military awards have direct material effects on career and status prizes.
scores.generality_reasoning: Access to state honors is a broad political category.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Honors like the 'prize for valor' provide lifelong prestige and benefit.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Lineage and 'consequence' (nobility) are fixed birth-statuses.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes a historical event involving contemporary political figures.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the military generals' bias as a factual occurrence.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Nobility is not defined by winning military awards.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Political governance is the power to command the state and its resources.
scores.generality_reasoning: Foundational societal axis: the right to rule.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Holds for the duration of adult male citizenship.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Citizenship/Sex are stable legal and biological categories.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes the standard 'virtue' (arete) of contemporary Greeks.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the prevailing standard of masculine excellence as a fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a man does not define the act of governing a city.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Managing indoor property involves control over physical assets and household goods.
scores.generality_reasoning: Domestic management is a major category of resource control.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Holds for the duration of a woman's adult life as head of a household.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Defined by biological sex (women).
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the actual division of labor in contemporary Greek society.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Describes the 'duty' (nomos) of women as a social fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being female does not inherently define managing a property.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The power to govern masters/others is a material legal resource.
scores.generality_reasoning: Governance is a foundational axis of societal power.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Exclusion is permanent while the person remains in the slave class.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Slave status is a fixed legal birth-status/condition.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the basic legal structure of contemporary slavery.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Agrees on the fundamental definition of slavery as absence of rule.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Slavery is defined as being governed, hence exclusion from governing is tautological.
